desc.title: Why using this tool?
desc.tagline: Create your best banner and surprise everyone!
warning.browser: Use Google Chrome or Opera for a better experience. Edge is reported as not compatible!
desc.text1: Let's be honest, there are many tools to create banners out there, but only this one is incredibly simple to use and features intuitive tools like drag-and-drop layers, multiple languages, and everything in one place!
desc.discord: ⚠️ If you have cool ideas, suggest them in our official discord server.
desc.donate: If you found this tool useful, consider making a donation for our hard work. We appreciate it!
premium.title: Premium Settings
premium.code_warning: ⚠️ There might be errors, report them in our Discord.
premium.textarea_ph: Paste JSON string or Minecraft command here...
plugins.title: Plugin Configurations
plugins.desc: Generate configurations for various supported plugins. It changes automatically!
